calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gilbert Jay, in court, for Mark Rodriguez, Petitioner.

The court begins by reminding Mr. Jay that the main issue with the petition is the failure to segregate the estate funds that exceed the FDIC limit. Mr. Jay reports that he is working on opening separate bank accounts in order to comply and respectfully asks the court to approve the petition.

The Accounting Petition is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Continued To Jul-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
